auth.label: API Key
auth.description: HTML to Image API key sent in the X-API-Key header.

actions.name: capture_website_screenshot
actions.description: Capture a public webpage with HTML to Image and return the generated screenshot URL.

url.description: The public webpage URL to capture, including the protocol.

selector.description: A CSS selector for capturing a specific element on the target page.

css.description: Additional CSS to inject before the image is rendered.

width.description: The viewport width in pixels from 1 to 5000.

height.description: The viewport height in pixels from 1 to 5000.

fullpage.description: Whether to capture the full page height instead of only the viewport height.

dpi.description: The device pixel ratio from 1 to 4. When fullpage is true, HTML to Image forces this to 1.

wait_for_selector.description: A CSS selector that must appear in the DOM before capture starts.

ms_delay.description: A fixed delay in milliseconds before capture, from 0 to 5000.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for synchronously capturing a website screenshot.

success.description: Whether HTML to Image reported the request as successful.

credits_remaining.description: The remaining image credits after the request.

id.description: The HTML to Image image identifier.

outputSchema.description: The synchronous HTML to Image result returned by the connector.

actions.name: convert_html_to_image
actions.description: Convert raw HTML and optional CSS to an image with HTML to Image and return the generated image URL.

html.description: The HTML content to render. This can include inline CSS and JavaScript.

css.description: Additional CSS to inject before the image is rendered.

width.description: The viewport width in pixels from 1 to 5000.

height.description: The viewport height in pixels from 1 to 5000.

fullpage.description: Whether to capture the full page height instead of only the viewport height.

dpi.description: The device pixel ratio from 1 to 4. When fullpage is true, HTML to Image forces this to 1.

wait_for_selector.description: A CSS selector that must appear in the DOM before capture starts.

ms_delay.description: A fixed delay in milliseconds before capture, from 0 to 5000.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for synchronously converting raw HTML and CSS into an image.

success.description: Whether HTML to Image reported the request as successful.

credits_remaining.description: The remaining image credits after the request.

id.description: The HTML to Image image identifier.

outputSchema.description: The synchronous HTML to Image result returned by the connector.
